purpose: Phase 4.14 — golden record of the post-Map-in-MVar genesis empty state hash and the Phase 1-3 multi-sig domain-separator constants. Companion to `RuntimeManager::empty_state_hash_fixed()` (in-code) and `runtime_spec.rs::empty_state_hash_should_be_the_same_as_hard_coded_cached_value`.

domain_separation_property.description: set_deploy_signature(&s) and set_deploy_signatures(&[&s]) must produce DIFFERENT deploy_id values for the same single-byte input s. This is verified by ll_rejection_spec.rs::legacy_vs_compound_set_deploy_signature_produces_distinct_deploy_ids.
guarantees: no deploy_id collision between Phase 1 (single-sig) and Phase 2+ (compound) paths
no wire-reorder attack can reuse a deploy_id (compound_deploy_id_depends_on_signature_order)

phase_1_7_pos_map_in_mvar_refinement.description: The PoS contract refinement (Map[deployerId -> amount] in MVar) changed PoS.rhox between commits 7c0a5c31 and 286c02c5. Any genesis-hash drift after Phase 4 landing must be reflected in this golden's `empty_state_hash_hex`.
phase_1_7_pos_map_in_mvar_refinement.back_compat_property: legacy single-sig deploys via the compute_state path produce byte-identical cost_trace_digest / deploy_log / state_hash vs legacy contract (Rocq theorem: single_sig_pos_map_observably_equivalent_after_{charge,refund} at MultiSignerRefinement.v:292-308).

phase_3_capabilities_registry.description: rho:system:capabilities (Phase 4.16) is bootstrapped at genesis via standard_deploys::capabilities_registry. Its registry URI is content-addressed from the pubkey hash; changing the CAPABILITIES_REGISTRY_PK constant will drift this golden.
